subcodes.first_line: O peerless saplings of the divine garden! God willing, may these cherished brethren, like the Pleiades cluster, in the celestial sphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهالهای بیهمال باغ الهی انشاء الله اخوان نازنین چون خوشه پروین در سپهر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
